name: Fake refund / order confirmation
description: Email claiming a refund or large purchase you didn't make, with a phone number to call to dispute it. The phone number connects to the scammer, who then asks for remote access to your computer or bank.
example: Thank you for your purchase! Your order #88421 for $499.99 (Norton 360 Premium 5-year) has been confirmed. If you did not authorize this purchase, call 1-888-555-0173 immediately to cancel.
red_flags: Phone number is the only way to dispute (no website link to a real account)
Amount is high enough to alarm but not absurd
